name: Output-to-Action Traceable
description: Every consequential action is traceable to a logged AI output that preceded it.
rationale: IOSCO Table 6.3: 'What processes ensure traceability between AI outputs and final actions taken?' The action must link back to the recorded output that drove it.

examples.fails: a Release with no logged AI output in its history

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
